top_signals.title: Central banks repatriate gold as global insecurity rises
top_signals.summary: Conflict, sanctions and decline in trust have made the institutions more cautious about storing bullion in other countries
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s Anthropic crackdown sets off AI alarms for U.S. allies
top_signals.summary: U.S. allies must now confront a future in which the White House can pull the plug on AI sales abroad as it pleases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Bottleneck Holding Back Britain's Energy Industry
top_signals.summary: Alan Chang believes Britain’s energy crisis is largely self-inflicted. The founder of Fuse Energy, the $5bn (£3.72bn) energy supplier and infrastructure developer, argues that the UK already has the ingredients needed to drive investment in the sector. What it lacks, he says, is a planning system capable of turning that potential into projects. “There is more money chasing infrastructure projects than there are infrastructure projects”, Chang told City AM. “It’s basically a self-imposed bottleneck for growth.”…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
